title: LIRA: Literature Integration, Ranking & Analysis
description: Bilingual (Portuguese/English) interactive R/Shiny application for systematic and scoping review support. Imports records from PubMed, Web of Science, Scopus, and custom sources; performs automatic deduplication; calculates composite relevance scores (thematic and bibliometric components); classifies articles into priority tiers (P1-P4); generates bibliometric networks with Louvain clustering (user-configurable seed); and exports a structured Excel workbook with PRISMA flow data, annotation templates, and auto-generated methods text in both languages. Cross-platform file navigation detects all available drives automatically. Developed at the Núcleo de Genética Humana e Molecular (NGHM), Universidade Federal do Espírito Santo (UFES).
